creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Sure.

make -C /usr/ports/graphics/gcolor2 -VLIB_DEPENDS | tr ' ' '\n'
libatk-1.0.so:accessibility/at-spi2-core
libglib-2.0.so:devel/glib20

libintl.so:devel/gettext-runtime
libgtk-x11-2.0.so:x11-toolkits/gtk20
libpango-1.0.so:x11-toolkits/pango


FYI I do all my development in jails. I find I get an experience
closer to the users of the ports I maintain for them, and I have
less variables to consider as well as more control of the environment.

I think this experience here, makes for a good example. :)

Hope this helped. :)
